headline: A glossary to help understand what happens in an initial public offering
summary: Anyone following SpaceX's plans to sell shares to the public is likely to hear terms thrown around that describe steps and components of an initial public offering.  It is the first time a company's value will be determined by a public market.  For example, Apple is traded as “AAPL” on the Nasdaq and Macy's is traded as “M” on the New York Stock Exchange.
